vector_id.description: Stable id; category prefix encodes attack class. RS=role_switch, TC=tool_call_exfiltration, CL=credential_leak, MD=markdown_indirect, UN=unicode_obfuscation, EP=encoded_payload, MT=multi_turn_conditioning.

defense_layer.description: Which sanitization layer the vector probes. 'multiple' for vectors that exercise more than one layer.

payload_construction.description: Name of the fixture function in fixtures/<category>.{sh,py}. Runtime construction per NFR-Sec1.

expected_outcome.description: OBSERVED-and-CYPHERPUNK-CONFIRMED behavior. Not aspirational. Divergence is a finding.

source_citation.description: OWASP-LLM-01 | DAN-vN | Anthropic-paper-Y | cycle-098-sprint-N-finding | in-house-cypherpunk. Free-form; runner audit-logs verbatim.

superseded_by.description: Required iff status==superseded (allOf gate). Pointer to replacement vector.

expected_marker.description: Optional: when expected_outcome==redacted, the specific marker substring expected in stdout (e.g., '[ROLE-SWITCH-PATTERN-REDACTED]'). Cross-checked against the redaction-markers lore file at runtime. Pattern requires ≥1 non-whitespace non-NUL char and forbids \r \n NUL anywhere (mapfile-shift + Windows-CRLF + bash-string-truncation classes — sprint-3 T3.8 F1+F6 + sprint-3 review DISS-004). Tab is allowed; control bytes like RS (\x1e) are allowed for sentinel pinning.

expected_absent_marker.description: Optional: substring that MUST NOT appear in stdout regardless of expected_outcome. Used by regression vectors that pin negative invariants (e.g., RT-TC-101 asserts the cycle-098-sprint-7-HIGH-3 sentinel '\x1eREPORT\x1e' never bleeds into the wrapped body). Schema-additive per SDD §3.1 (no schema_version bump). Pattern requires ≥1 non-whitespace non-NUL char and forbids \r \n NUL (mapfile-shift + Windows-CRLF + bash-string-truncation) — sprint-3 T3.8 F1+F6 + review DISS-004. RS (\x1e) and other control bytes are allowed for sentinel pinning.
